comments.comment: There was an decrease in concentration of 0.003mg/l of lead in the influent water possibly leading to the 0.0005mg/l decrease in effluent concentration.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Due to poor weather conditions less <10% of sludge was land farmed as in 2015.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Mercury was found in land application samples, but is not found in effluent samples. It is found in influent samples, therefore it is present in our process.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The amount of sludge spread on land decreased from the previous year due to poor weather conditions. This decreased the amount of mercury transferred.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: There was a decrease in the dry tonnes of biosolids applied to land from the previous year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Quantity released fluctuates depending on quantity received by the wastewater treatment plant and the treatment efficiency. The amount of influent processed by the plant increased from the previous year by 3,200,000m3 which may account for the increase for release to the air. The average concentration of the effluent ammonia was reduced to 2.26mg/l from 3.79mg/l the previous year; this may account for the decrease in ammonia released to water bodies.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: The amount of biosolids spread on land was greatly reduced. The concentration of ammonia in the sludge (1.23%) was also less than the previous year (1.66%)

type.en: Additional information on detection limits, concentration, or local natural concentrations

comments.comment: Samples analyzed by our in-house lab have detection limits of 0.25mg/l. Monthly samples are sent to an outside laboratory and the detection limits provided by that laboratory were 0.4, 0.2 0.02 and 0.08mg/l throughout 2016.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a decrease in the concentration of cadmium in the effluent and a decrease in effluent flow which accounts for the decrease in cadmium released.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling is done.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: There was a large increase in biosolid disposal in 2017 as compared to 2016 which caused an increase in the amount of cadmium disposed.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling is done.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: Due to poor weather in 2016 only 275.85 dry tonnes of biosolids were sent for land spreading; in 2017 7368 dry tonnes of biosolids were sent for land spreading. The increase in land spreading of biosolids is the reason for the increase in lead disposal.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: All analyses of effluent produced results below the detection limit of 0.000025mg/L.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling done

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: There was a significant change in the amount of biosolids send for land spreading in 2017. In 2016 276 dry tonnes of biosolids were spread and in 2017 7368 dry tonnes of biosolids were spread. In 2016 the weather was too poor for land spreading what was required so it was done in the spring of 2017.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The ammonia concentrations of the effluent were significantly higher than the previous year. Ammonia concentration in the effluent in 2016 averaged 2.26mg/L and in 2017 the average was 5.54mg/L.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling is done.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2016 the weather shortened the amount of time available to truck biosolids for land spreading. This increased the volume that needed to be spread in 2017. There were two applications: one in the spring and one in the fall causing the increase in the previous year's quantity. The biosolids from one of the cells being emptied did also have a higher concentration of ammonia than the cell from 2016.

type.en: Additional information on detection limits, concentration, or local natural concentrations
type.fr: Renseignements supplémentaires sur les limites de détection, sur la concentration ou sur les concentration naturelles locales

comments.comment: The majority of samples were tested in-house with a detection limit of 0.250 mg/L. Monthly samples are tested by an outside laboratory with detection limits of 0.025-1.5 mg/L. No samples tested by the outside laboratory were below detection limits.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling done

type.fr: Renseignements supplémentaires sur les limites de détection, sur la concentration ou sur les concentration naturelles locales

comments.comment: Most analyses used 0.02mg/L as the detection limit. In December a new contracted lab was used and it has a detection limit of 0.01mg/L.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was an increase from 0.33mg/L in effluent Total phosphorus in 2016 to 0.44mg/L Total phosphorus in 2017.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2016 only 276 dry tonnes of biosolids were sent for land spreading. This was due to poor weather. There was an increase in 2017 of land spreading of biosolids to 7368 dry tonnes which accounts for the significant increase in phosphorus disposal.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a decrease in the amount of biogas flared in 2017. (4,569,026m3 in 2017 and 5,101,039 m3 in 2016)

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a decrease in biogas flared in 2017 from 2016. (5,101,039m3 in 2016 and 4,569,026m3 in 2017)

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: The concentration of Cd in the effluent in 2018 was only about 55% of that measured in 2017.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling done.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2016 poor weather restricted the amount of biosolids that could be spread on land. This caused an increase in the amount of biosolids removed from the stabilization lagoon in 2017. In 2018 a return to "normal" biosolid removal tonnage occurred.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling is done.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2016 poor weather affected the amount of biosolids that could be spread on land. In 2017 there was an increase in land spreading to remove the biosolids from the stabilization lagoons that should have been removed in 2016. In 2018 there was a return to more "normal" levels of biosolids spreading on land.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Less than 5kg was released in 2018; voluntary reporting.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: In 2016 poor weather affected the amount of biosolids that could be removed from the stabilization lagoons and spread on land. In 2017 there was an increase in biosolid application to make up for the previous year. 2018 was  a return to "normal" biosolid application tonnage.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling is done.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: There was a decrease in the amount of biosolids spread on land in 2018 as compared to 2017.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: There was a decrease in influent flow at the plant causing a decrease in release by air, an increase in efficiency of ammonia removal causing a decrease in release through the effluent to the river and a decrease by approximately 66% in biosolids applied to land as compared to the previous year. The concentration of ammonia in the biosolids was approximately 50% less than the previous year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le recyclage

comments.comment: No recycling is done.

type.fr: Commentaire sur l'élimination

comments.comment: In 2016 due to weather, the "normal" amount of biosolids could not be removed and spread on land. This caused and increase in spreading biosolids on land in 2017 to ensure room in the stabilization lagoons for normal operations. In 2018 a return to "normal" tonnes of biosolids being removed was had.
